data.body:
PASS-2 independent verification (findings 0–4):

[0] prod_impact=none debt_impact=low blast=local likelihood=med revers=easy; cited_reference_accurate=na (no code ref). E2 spec-specificity: plan body says "story A's fixtures/fake through the production path" without naming module/fn; the seam IS named precisely in the referenced story-A artifact (_fakes.py install→fetcher._load_acli→fetch_snapshot), so charitable reading partially mitigates. evidence_entails_finding=yes (plan text itself omits it); no_existing_mitigation=no (the named dependency artifact carries it).

[1] prod_impact=none debt_impact=low blast=local likelihood=med revers=easy; cited_reference_accurate=na. F1 in-session-evaluability: AC2 "every/none" verifiable only against audit output. The "What" DOES bound the scan to scripts/jira-pressure-test/*.sh (confirmed: only e2e_field_validation_probe.sh + e2e_validation_probe.sh + README; single live NOT-SYNCED guard at L1543-1547), so the set is small/tractable, not unbounded. evidence_entails_finding=yes (deliverable list not stated as artifact); no_existing_mitigation=no (bounded scope substantially mitigates).

[2] prod_impact=low debt_impact=med blast=module likelihood=high revers=moderate; cited_reference_accurate=yes. CONFIRMED at _fakes.py:50-63 — FakeAcliClient exposes only search_issues/get_comment_map/get_issuelinks_map/get_parent_map (read-only); docstring (L13-17) scopes it to fetch_snapshot/compute_snapshot inbound enrichment merge. It cannot produce the local→Jira→local push half. test_reconcile_roundtrip.py reproduces the outbound half via _outbound_jira_shape (L122-142), NOT the fake. Real mechanism gap. evidence_entails_finding=yes; no_existing_mitigation=yes (plan doesn't specify how the outbound half is obtained).

[3] prod_impact=none debt_impact=med blast=module likelihood=high revers=easy; cited_reference_accurate=yes. CONFIRMED: test_reconcile_roundtrip.py docstring L1-28 ("chain the REAL pure differs end to end against mock fixtures (no live Jira)"), convergence assertion (inbound emits NO change), covers comments(L373)/links-both-directions(L425)/parent(L318)/labels, pytestmark=integration (L42 → CI-runnable). Substantially meets AC1+AC4. Plan never mentions it; file_impact even names a NEW file (test_roundtrip.py), reinforcing duplication risk. evidence_entails_finding=yes; no_existing_mitigation=yes.

[4] prod_impact=none debt_impact=low blast=local likelihood=med revers=easy; cited_reference_accurate=yes (ABSENCE finding, comparator file verified to exist). CONFIRMED by absence: plan states no positive rationale tying the fake-through-fetch seam to the bidirectional goal; the established differ-chaining seam (test_reconcile_roundtrip.py) is the obvious comparator and is unaddressed. Dependent on [3]'s premise (existing seam), which holds. evidence_entails_finding=yes; no_existing_mitigation=yes.

Note: findings 2/3/4 are FP6-exempt — they target this-repo test architecture, not a third-party library contract, so the adopted-library carve-out does not apply.
